reason: Fase N wave 1 (same 0.0.0 baseline as 003-components-marsui-language; this declaration advances the sealed candidate, so the cumulative delta stays MAJOR because the V.2 deliberate effective-value changes remain part of this candidate). The wave adds five additive elements, none of which grows the frozen legacy root barrel - all ship only via direct subpaths. ki-divider (attributes: orientation; part: divider; component tokens --ki-divider-thickness/color/radius/spacing in both themes) per approved spec 020-ki-divider. ki-status (attributes: tone/ring/label; part: dot; component tokens --ki-status-size/radius/shadow/ring-width/ring-color and the five --ki-status-{tone}-color fills in both themes) per approved spec 021-ki-status. ki-icon-button (attributes: variant/tone/size/label/disabled; parts: button/icon; a single presentational default slot; component tokens --ki-icon-button-{size}-{size,icon-size,radius}, the --ki-icon-button-{variant}-{tone}-{state}-{bg,fg,border} matrix, per-variant shadows/bevel/overlay and focus-ring, in both themes) per approved spec 022-ki-icon-button, reusing the button semantic references 1:1 (icon ramp 16/18/20/24/28 is the only dimensional delta). ki-avatar and its ki-avatar-group companion (spec 019-ki-avatar, companion-in-parent-spec charter rule): ki-avatar (attributes: label/src/initials/size; parts: avatar/image/initials/icon; no slots, no events; component tokens --ki-avatar-{size}-{size,font-size,icon-size} over the verified 20/24/32/40/48/56 MarsUI ramp plus family-level radius/bg/fg/border/typography) and ki-avatar-group (attributes: max/size; default slot restricted to ki-avatar children; parts: group/counter; component tokens --ki-avatar-group-{size}-{overlap,counter-padding-inline,counter-font-size} plus ring and counter families). The tokens stylesheet budgets rise 10 KB -> 11 KB (brotli: onmars 10.22 KB, material3 10.4 KB) for founder review, precedent commit c9c9424 (9 KB -> 10 KB). Declared deviations pending founder ratification: the avatar Type=text gradient flattened to the solid Surface/primary_med_em bg, the synthesized xs/xxs counter steps and the naming skew of the 20px group frame (spec 019 Assumptions, design-extraction decisions 2 and 6). Nothing is published yet (0.0.0, private).
